title: Where Is Tong?
original_title: ๙ พระคุ้มครอง
overview: When the much hated 'weird woman' sacrificed her life to save one of the 5 friends, they vow to replay her by looking for her lost son. The 5 friends arrived in Bangkok, each armed with only a Buddha amulet, they were met with many adventures and hardship.
